sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard applies to tempe as defined in Section 2 below and intended for human consumption. It does not apply to those that undergone further processing other than freezing.
sections.retrieval_text:
SCOPE
number=1.
level=1
This standard applies to tempe as defined in Section 2 below and intended for human consumption. It does not apply to those that undergone further processing other than freezing.

page_spans.text: This standard applies to tempe as defined in Section 2 below and intended for human consumption. It does not apply to those that undergone further processing other than freezing.

sections.title: DESCRIPTION
sections.text: Tempe is a compact, white, cake -form product, prepared from dehulled boiled soybeans through solid state fermentation with Rhizopus spp.
sections.retrieval_text:

number=2.

sections.title: ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS
sections.retrieval_text:
ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS
number=3.
level=1

sections.title: FOOD ADDITIVES
sections.text:
4.1 None permitted.
4.2 Processing aids.
Processing aids can be used in these products to control acidity during soaking the beans.
Processing aids used in products covered by this standard shall comply with the Guidelines on substances used as processing aids (CXG 75-2010).

page_spans.text:
4.1 None permitted.
4.2 Processing aids.
Processing aids can be used in these products to control acidity during soaking the beans.
Processing aids used in products covered by this standard shall comply with the Guidelines on substances used as processing aids (CXG 75-2010).

sections.title: CONTAMINANTS
sections.text:
5.1 The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum levels (MLs) of the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995).
5.2 The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum residue limits (MRLs) for pesticides established by the Codex Alimentarius Commission.

page_spans.text:
5.1 The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum levels (MLs) of the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995).
5.2 The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum residue limits (MRLs) for pesticides established by the Codex Alimentarius Commission.

sections.title: Composition
sections.retrieval_text:
ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS > Composition
number=3.1
level=2
Product covered by this standard shall consist of the following ingredients:
(a) Soybeans (any variety);
(b) Mould of Rhizopus spp. (R. oligosporus,R. oryzae and/or R. stolonifer) mix with cooked rice powder, rice bran powder and/or wheat bran powder as an inocula.

sections.title: Quality Factors
sections.retrieval_text:
ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS > Quality Factors
number=3.2
level=2

sections.title: Classification of “defectives”
sections.text: Any container that fails to meet the applicable quality requirements referred to in Section 3.2 should be considered as a “defective”.
sections.retrieval_text:
ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS > Classification of “defectives”
number=3.3
level=2
Any container that fails to meet the applicable quality requirements referred to in Section 3.2 should be considered as a “defective”.

page_spans.text: Any container that fails to meet the applicable quality requirements referred to in Section 3.2 should be considered as a “defective”.

sections.title: Organoleptic
sections.text:
(a) Texture: Compact and not easily disintegrated upon cutting with knife.
(b) Colour: White colour of luxurious growth of mycellium of Rhizopus spp.
(c) Flavour: Characteristic of tempe flavour, nutty, meaty, and mushroom -like.
(d) Odour: Characteristic of fresh tempe odour without ammonia smell.

sections.title: Foreign Matters
sections.text: Tempe shall be free from foreign matters (e.g. other beans, small stone, husk etc).

sections.title: Analytical Requirements
sections.text:
(a)  Moisture content 65% w/w max.
(b)  Protein content 15% w/w min.
(c)  Lipid content 7% w/w min.
(d)  Crude fibre 2.5% w/w max.

sections.title: HYGIENE
sections.text:
6.1 It is recommended that the product covered by the provisions of this Standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CXC 1-1969), and other relevant Codex texts such as Codes of Hygienic Practice and Codes of Practice.
6.2 The products should comply with the microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria related to Foods (CXG 21-1997).

sections.title: LABELLING
sections.text:
7.1. The products covered by the provisions of this Standard shall be labelled in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Prepacked Foods (CXS 1-1985).
7.2 Name of the product
The name of the product to be shown on the label shall be “Tempe”.

pages.title: REGIONAL STANDARD FOR TEMPE
pages.summary: Página contém título principal do documento e cabeçalho de padrão, sem estrutura de seções ou texto interno para mapeamento.
Página contém cinco seções principais numeradas de 1 a 5, com subseções detalhadas na seção 3. Texto interno associado corretamente a cada título, sem indícios de continuidade entre páginas.

A página contém três seções principais numeradas: 6 HYGIENE, 7 LABELLING e 8 METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING, com subseções 6.1, 6.2, 7.1 e 7.2 mapeadas corretamente. Todos os títulos estão publicados na página e o texto interno está associado aos títulos adequadamente, sem indícios de continuidade entre páginas.
